features: A Face Body Paint palette refilled 20 creamy intensive pigmented colors in a convenient and sturdy plastic case that applies easily with sponge or brush. It can be used on the face and body.

Tattoo Face Body Paint is made of high quality ingredients to be easy blended, comfortable on the skin while being vibrant. It remain flexible to resist cracking while drying quickly to a smudge-proof and durable finish but minimal rub-off.

20 flash Aqua colors is suitable for creating many different looks. It included bossy gold and silver, pink,purple,red,yellow, blue,green,brown of all basic (plus extra black and white). It meet the needs of different occasions. The colors can be easily shaded together to obtain a wide variety of effects for artistic makeup or special effects coloring.

Non-toxic oil-based painting palette, the formula is moist, semi-soft, safe and gentle on skin. Richer color-saturated coverage than ordinary makeup, easy to wear and easy to wash off with olive oil or professional waterproof makeup remover.

Professional face paint for festivals, carnivals, birthday, campfire or theme parties, SFX makeup,stage performances, not to forget fun halloween and other occasions! Easily create crown, costume, bruise, blood, cosplay looks. Friendly materials are safe for both popular kid and adult.
description: Product Description Features: 20 Vibrant Pigmented Color. Large Pan of Black & White Waterproof Long Lasting Effect Creamy Oil Based Texture Remove: UCANBE paint can be removed easily by waterproof makeup remover/olive oil. Wait for 5-10 Seconds then wipe them all Use Primer before application can effectively avoid stain happened. UCANBE Face & Body Paint Palette It work exceptionally well for all aspects of face and body painting such as line work, base work, blending and layering. No matter you are a professional face painter or beginners, we have everything you need to create beautiful and lasting designs. Apply: Use some loction/Primer before application. Apply for the color you want with your brushes/sponge directly( NO water needed ) Wait a few seconds from one layer to anther. Set up with Setting Powder to get a quick dry effect Color Include: Violet , Dark Teal, blood red, army green, Mango, Dark Pink, Dark blue, Orange, Sky blue, Yellow, Lime green, Magenta, Dark Burgundy, Light brown, Gold , Coral, Turquoise, Sliver, BLACK & WHITE, 20 Colors in total. Tips: 1. Do a patchy test before application, such as ear back or inner arms. If allergies occurred, please stop using it immediately. 2. If you're beginner in face painting, it's recommended that use some stencil or view some tutorials
